name: SplitButtonComponent
description:
Split Button component, used to enhance standard HTML button and add possibility to put some dropdown with additional options. ```html
  • Option 1
  • Option 2
    • ```

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: The icon to include in the button. See the icon page for the list of icons.

inputs.name: expandButtonTitle
inputs.description: Title attribute used to describe expand button

inputs.name: fdType
inputs.description:
The type of the button. Types include 'standard', 'positive', 'medium', and 'negative'.
Leave empty for default (Action button).'

inputs.name: fixedWidth
inputs.description: Whether or not the element should keep a fixed width. The width could change if the text changes length.

inputs.name: glyph
inputs.description: The icon to include in the button. See the icon page for the list of icons.

inputs.name: mainAction
inputs.description:
The object that contains the mainActionTitle, keepMainAction option and the callback function that should be
executed when the button is clicked.

outputs.name: primaryButtonClicked
outputs.description: Event sent when primary button is clicked

methods.name: _onGroupFocused
methods.description:
Wrapper gets focused programmatically by menu
when the "escape" button is pressed.
In this case we need to transit focus to the "more actions" button

methods.name: selectMenuItem
methods.description: Function called to select a menu item for the split button.
